entities.description: emmc is a type of chip connected to the cpu via a dedicated interface  used for storage and data transfer
cpu is a component that provides a dedicated interface for connecting to an emmc chip
8bit    refers to a data line with a width of 8 bits  used for data transfer between the cpu and emmc chip

relations.description: connects to an emmc chip via a dedicated cpu interface
uses the cpu s dedicated interface to connect to the emmc chip
cpu uses an 8bit data line for communication with the emmc chip
